subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Covenant! When the Light of the Most Glorious ascended to the Supreme Concourse, tumult shook the pillars of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب میثاق نیر ملا ابهی چون شاهد انجمن بالا شد ولوله در ارکان عالم افتاد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
